title: pseudostellaria heterantha var. linearifolia
intro: Pseudostellaria heterantha var. linearifolia, also known as Tibetan plantain or Prickly plantain, is a type of flowering plant in the Primulaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas and the Tibetan Plateau. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pseudostellaria heterantha var. linearifolia include reducing swelling and pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
